# Yatri Cloud

> Yatri Cloud is a free cloud-certification platform for AWS, Azure, GCP, DevOps, Kubernetes and Terraform: practice tests, study guides, exam dumps, video courses, community events, discounted exam vouchers (50% OFF), trainings and mentorship. 50K+ learners, 4.8★ average rating.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.yatricloud.com/): Certification vouchers at 50% OFF, how the exam-scheduling process works
- [Training](https://www.yatricloud.com/training): Live and self-paced cloud certification trainings
- [Practice Tests](https://www.yatricloud.com/practice-tests): Free practice tests by provider and exam
- [Exam Dumps](https://www.yatricloud.com/exam-dumps): Verified exam dumps and study resources
- [Certification Paths](https://www.yatricloud.com/paths): Guided journeys from beginner to professional certifications
- [Events](https://www.yatricloud.com/events): Community events, workshops and webinars
- [Udemy Courses](https://www.yatricloud.com/udemy): Curated video courses
- [Store](https://www.yatricloud.com/yatristore): Discounted vouchers and exam products
- [Mentorship](https://www.yatricloud.com/mentorship): 1:1 sessions with cloud mentors
- [Achievements](https://www.yatricloud.com/achievements): Wall of fame — certified Yatris
- [Become a Trainer](https://www.yatricloud.com/become-trainer): Apply to teach on Yatri Cloud

## Contact

- [Book a meeting](https://calendly.com/yatricloud/40min): Schedule an exam-voucher call
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/yatricloud)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@yatricloud)
